title: Crew Clock-In Wave A — Self-Service on Own Device
description: Allow crew members to clock themselves in/out from their own phone with selfie + GPS location. Currently only the lead tech can clock crew in via CrewClockInScreen. This wave adds self-clock-in/out API endpoints and a Clock In button on the WO detail screen for crew-assigned technicians.

endpoints.description: Crew member clocks themselves in with selfie + GPS
Crew member clocks themselves out with GPS

modifications.description: Add selfClockIn and selfClockOut controller methods. selfClockIn validates caller is in work_order_crew, checks no open time entry, accepts selfie + GPS, creates time_entry with clock_in_method='self'. selfClockOut finds and closes the caller's open time entry.
Add routes for self-clock-in and self-clock-out endpoints
Add SelfClockInRequest interface, selfClockIn() and selfClockOut() API functions, getMyCrewStatus() helper
Add self-clock-in/out button for crew members. Use useAuth() to get current user ID, check if user is in crew list, show Clock In/Out button with selfie capture modal.

doNotTouch.reason: Lead tech crew management — unchanged. Existing lead flow stays as-is.
No schema changes — clock_in_method column already supports 'self' value.
Theme system — unrelated to this wave.

integrationChecks.description: POST /api/mobile/sync/work-orders/:id/self-clock-in creates time entry for authenticated crew member
POST /api/mobile/sync/work-orders/:id/self-clock-out closes the caller's open time entry
Self-clock-in returns 403 if caller is not assigned to the work order's crew
WO detail screen shows Clock In button for crew members, Clock Out when already clocked in

rollbackPlan.immediate: Revert controller + routes + api.service + WO detail screen changes
rollbackPlan.safeFallback: Self-clock-in unavailable — lead tech crew clock-in still works
rollbackPlan.dataImpact: None — time_entries created are standard records, no schema changes

selfCheck.step: Deploy to staging. Login as tech@fieldops.dev. Navigate to a WO with crew. Verify Clock In button appears. Test self-clock-in and clock-out.

notes: No DB migration needed — clock_in_method='self' already exists as default value. The existing crewClockIn requires lead tech auth; selfClockIn allows any crew member to clock themselves.
